summary: Iteration 9 - Progress Map tab FULLY VERIFIED. All features tested and working correctly. Progress Map screen displays header, Lifetime Iron Miles card (4,820 miles with progress bar), Weekly Progress cards (4 Workouts, 85 Miles, 3 Day Streak), THE ROAD section with 6 milestones (100-10000), dashed road connectors, and Milestones Unlocked list (4 unlocked). All milestone states correct: 100/500/1000/2500 unlocked (green), 5000 current (gold), 10000 locked. Tab navigation works correctly. Dashboard and Generate Workout flow still functional. No regressions. Pure UI scaffold with placeholder data as expected.

react_native_issues.issue: Deprecation warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'
react_native_issues.impact: No functional impact - same as previous iterations

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Progress Map screen implemented as pure UI scaffold with placeholder data (no backend queries)
✅ All required testIDs present: progress-map-scroll, milestone-100, milestone-500, milestone-1000, milestone-2500, milestone-5000, milestone-10000
✅ Header displays 'PROGRESS MAP' title and 'Your Miles of Discipline journey' subtitle
✅ Lifetime Iron Miles card shows 4,820 miles with progress bar (96.4% to 5,000)
✅ Progress bar uses LinearGradient with gold colors (goldDim → goldMid → goldBright)
✅ '180 miles to Iron Driver' text displayed correctly
✅ Weekly Progress section shows 3 cards with correct placeholder data: 4 Workouts, 85 Miles, 3 Day Streak
✅ THE ROAD section displays 6 milestones vertically with correct states
✅ Milestone 100 'Left the Parking Lot' - unlocked (green checkmark, green border)
✅ Milestone 500 'First Long Haul' - unlocked (green checkmark, green border)
✅ Milestone 1000 'Road Warrior' - unlocked (green checkmark, green border)
✅ Milestone 2500 'Highway Legend' - unlocked (green checkmark, green border)
✅ Milestone 5000 'Iron Driver' - current target (gold border, truck icon, '180 miles to go')
✅ Milestone 10000 'Diesel Discipline' - locked (gray, shows '5,180 miles away')
✅ Dashed road connectors visible between milestones (vertical dashed lines with goldDim color)
✅ Milestones Unlocked list shows 4 unlocked milestones with green checkmarks
✅ ScrollView with testID 'progress-map-scroll' works smoothly
✅ All React Native components used correctly (View, Text, ScrollView, SafeAreaView, TouchableOpacity)
✅ StyleSheet.create() used for all styles
✅ All text wrapped in Text components
✅ LinearGradient used for visual effects (progress bar, milestone shields)
✅ Iron Miles color palette consistent with Dashboard (gold, green, dark backgrounds)
✅ Bottom tab navigation works: tab-index (Dashboard), tab-progress-map, tab-workouts, tab-fuel
✅ Tab testID naming: Dashboard uses 'tab-index' (route name), not 'tab-dashboard' - this is correct per _layout.tsx implementation
✅ No regressions: Dashboard loads correctly, Generate Workout flow still works
✅ No React Native red screen errors
✅ No console errors (only low-priority deprecation warning)

success_rate.backend: N/A - Backend testing not requested (pure UI scaffold)
success_rate.frontend: 100% - All Progress Map features tested and working: Tab loads, Header, Lifetime Miles card, Weekly Progress cards, THE ROAD with 6 milestones, dashed connectors, Milestones Unlocked list, scrolling, tab navigation, Dashboard return, Generate Workout flow

seed_data_creation: No seed data created. Progress Map uses hardcoded placeholder data: LIFETIME_MILES = 4820, NEXT_MILESTONE_MILES = 5000, WEEKLY = {workouts: 4, miles: 85, streak: 3}, MILESTONES array with 6 entries.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 9 adds Progress Map tab to replace 'Coming Soon' placeholder. This is a pure UI scaffold with hardcoded placeholder data - no backend integration yet. All visual elements tested and working: header, lifetime miles card with progress bar, weekly stats, 6 milestones with correct states (4 unlocked/green, 1 current/gold, 1 locked/gray), dashed road connectors, unlocked milestones list. Tab navigation works correctly. No regressions to Dashboard or Generate Workout flow. Ready for backend integration in future iterations.
